nodes.context: Colombian drug cartel that established cocaine trafficking routes into the US through Miami in the 1970s and 1980s.
Criminal organization that previously controlled drug smuggling in Florida before being superseded by the Medellín Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: By 1975, Pablo Escobar and the Medellín cartel had established cocaine trafficking routes into the US through Miami, superseding the 'Cuban mafia' which had previously controlled drug smuggling in Florida.
edges.context: The Medellín Cartel replaced the Cuban mafia as the dominant drug smuggling organization in Florida.
